title: FPS Boost
description: Optimized modpack that combines visual enhancements, performance improvements, and quality-of-life features to deliver a smooth, modern, and aesthetically enhanced Minecraft experience without sacrificing stability.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c115b0f5cb40cd1632d7f53859cfbed30060cb6b.png)

🎯 Overview

abric-based modpack focused on delivering the best visual and performance experience possible while keeping the essence of vanilla Minecraft. It’s designed for players who want high-quality graphics, better frame rates, and smooth gameplay without unnecessary content bloat.

⚙️ Performance Optimization

This pack integrates powerful optimization mods to make Minecraft run faster and more efficiently, even on mid-range systems.
FerriteCore, Krypton, and BadOptimizations reduce memory usage and improve performance.
ImmediatelyFast and Dynamic FPS ensure smoother rendering and better performance while multitasking.
Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (C2ME) enhances world loading speeds for a seamless experience.

🌄 Visual Enhancements

Optifine Better MC brings stunning visuals to the game while maintaining shader compatibility.
Iris Shaders provides support for beautiful shader effects.
Continuity, Entity Texture Features (ETF), and Entity Model Features (EMF) improve the appearance of blocks, entities, and textures.

LambDynamicLights adds realistic lighting effects from handheld or dropped light sources.

🧭 Quality of Life Improvements

A set of lightweight mods improve usability and comfort during gameplay.
BetterF3 and Clean F3 enhance the debug screen for a more readable and customizable interface.
Auth Me provides better account management and login convenience.
Cloth Config API allows intuitive configuration of mod settings directly in-game.

🧩 Core Dependencies

The modpack includes essential libraries to ensure stability and mod compatibility.
Fabric API and Fabric Language Kotlin are core components required for most Fabric mods.
FerriteCore and ImmediatelyFast further reinforce the modpack’s optimization foundation.
